title: Biden again calls Xi ‘dictator’ after Chinese prez warns against ‘turning back’ on Beijing
description: President Biden called Chinese President Xi Jinping "a dictator" Wednesday after meeting with Xi for about four hours near San Francisco.
keywords: News, asia, china, dictators, joe biden, xi jinping
